items.title: Reigning NPOY Sarah Strong is rehabbing an Achilles issue that’s sidelined her for summer workouts, she said.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Reigning NPOY Sarah Strong is rehabbing an Achilles issue that’s sidelined her for summer workouts, she said.

Her Achilles started bothering her last summer & the pain progressed at the end of the season. She averaged 18.4 PPG/7.7 RPG/3.8 APG/2.3 SPG/1.7 BPG as a soph.

www.espn.com/womens-colle...

media.title: Sarah Strong sidelined from summer workouts with Achilles issue
